message:
feat(examples): add external consumer simulation example

Add examples/external_consumer.rs demonstrating how downstream crates
can consume asupersync's public API:

- Import core types: Budget, Cx, LabConfig, LabRuntime, Outcome, Time
- Show Cx::for_testing() usage for unit test contexts
- Demonstrate LabRuntime instantiation with deterministic seed
- Exercise basic Outcome construction

This example serves as both documentation and a compile-time check that
the public API exports are correctly organized for external consumption.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
